nodes.label: The Summons
nodes.body: A hooded stranger arrives at dusk with an urgent letter sealed in black wax.

nodes.label: The Crossing
nodes.body: The black river runs fast and cold. Someone must swim it tonight.

nodes.label: The Bargain
nodes.body: A witch blocks the road and demands a truth in payment before she steps aside.

nodes.label: The Tower
nodes.body: The signal fire must be lit. Two pairs of hands are needed at the summit.

nodes.label: The Ambush
nodes.body: Shadows move between the pines. Someone needs to hold the line.

elements.label: Elara
elements.bio: Knight-errant. First into the fire, last to speak.

elements.label: Corvus
elements.bio: Raven-tongued spy. Traded in secrets once too often.

elements.label: Mira
elements.bio: Apprentice scholar. Knows three true things about people.

elements.label: Zazo
elements.bio: Apprentice scholar. Knows three true things about people.

elements.label: Ellu
elements.bio: Apprentice scholar. Knows three true things about people.
